description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pre-release that runs on push and pull request events to the ros2-development branch, and can be triggered manually. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build pre-release tests for ROS2 on multiple Ubuntu environments, including humble on ubuntu-22.04 and galactic and foxy on ubuntu-20.04. For each job, check out the repository and run industrial_ci from ros-industrial/industrial_ci@master.
